channel.title: Problems on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Problems on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.copyright: ©2023 The Gamer's Hollow | Hero Image by Lorenzo Herrera on Unsplash

item.title: Xbox to acquire Activision, Blizzard
item.description: On January 18th, 2022, Microsoft announced that they would be acquiring Activision Blizzard for an all-out purchase of $68.7 billion USD. Phill Spencer (CEO of Xbox Game Studios; Microsoft Gaming) said in a tweet “Had good calls this week with leaders at Sony. I confirmed our intent to honor all existing agreements upon acquisition of Activision Blizzard and our desire to keep Call of Duty on PlayStation. Sony is an important part of our industry, and we value our relationship.

item.title: My Thoughts On Super Mario 3D All-Stars
item.description: Today, i will be telling you my thoughts on Super Mario 3D all stars. Super Mario 3D all Stars is a Super Mario 35th anniversary game that was released September 18th 2020 for 59.99 USD it was taken down march, 31st 2021, you can still find it in stores but it is very rare. it includes Super Mario 64, Super Mario Sunshine, and Super Mario Galaxy. Super Mario 64

item.title: E3 2021 Rumors
item.description: So today i will be talking about the E3 rumors. to watch E3 on June 12 to 15th go here www.e3expo.com or look at youtube.com/channel/UCNy_lYhgyQAG1KAqv5DRUEw(this is E3’s youtube channel) if you any of you have ideas/thoughts about what things are going to be announced then put them in the comment section below. I think that breath of the wild 2 will be announce and they will give a release date, i also think the switch pro will be announced and will have preorders up on that day and it will release on august 1st with a price of $399.

item.title: 2021 switch ideas
item.description: So because it is 2021 that means a new year of fun filled excitement about gaming, I am hoping for a switch pro in 2021 and I wanted to talk about that and a few other things involving Nintendo Switch. Apex Legends- is leaked to be coming to switch on febuary second in Japan febuary first in the USA. so we saw a video on YouTube posted by apex Japan and shortly after it was posted the video was taken down and it seemed to be a very strong leak in my opinion.
